query:
UPDATE nhl_teams SET dbSlug = 'new_york_islanders' WHERE abbrev = 'NYI' AND dbSlug = 'ny_islanders';
SELECT abbrev, name, dbSlug, vsinSlug FROM nhl_teams WHERE abbrev = 'NYI';
